title: Panko Crusted Salmon
instructions:
Lightly spray a foil lined cookie sheet or a foil baking sheet with cooking spray and place the salmon on the sheet. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl combine the mustard and 1 tsp of thyme. In another small bowl mix the panko with the remaining thyme, olive oil, parsley and paprika. Add a little salt and pepper.
Spread the mustard mixture on the salmon and top with the panko mixture.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish flakes.
